sections.company_snapshot: VectorForge is an AI infrastructure startup focused on providing a high-performance GPU vector engine. The company is currently working with three enterprise design partners and serves approximately 220 million vectors per day [claim:vf-c1].
investment_hypotheses: VectorForge's traction with enterprise design partners and significant vector serving capacity indicates strong product-market fit [claim:vf-c1].
The CTO's expertise and recognition in the field of approximate nearest-neighbor search provide a competitive advantage in developing cutting-edge vector database solutions [claim:vf-c2].
The expanding market for vector databases, driven by the adoption of retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), presents a significant growth opportunity for VectorForge [claim:vf-c3].

strengths: Strong technical team with recognized expertise in vector databases [claim:vf-c2].
Proven traction with enterprise design partners and growing query volume [claim:vf-c1].
weaknesses: Limited revenue with only $18K MRR from two paid partners [claim:vf-c4].
opportunities: Expanding TAM for vector databases with the rise of RAG [claim:vf-c3].
threats: Potential competition from established vector database companies.

sections.problem_product: VectorForge addresses the bottleneck in inference-time retrieval for vector databases, a critical issue as retrieval-augmented generation becomes more prevalent [claim:vf-c3].
sections.traction_kpis: The company has three design partners in production, serves 220 million vectors daily, and reports a 3x quarter-over-quarter query growth [claim:vf-c1].

what_would_change_my_mind: Disclosure of a detailed cap table and financial projections.
